hero.subtitle: ASMA Advanced Technology (AAT) is your trusted Saudi partner achieving digital excellence through innovative software engineering and intelligent tech integrations.

aboutUs.title: A Decennial Heritage of Tech Leadership
aboutUs.subtitle: Established in Riyadh in 2009, AAT is a licensed Saudi enterprise at the forefront of digital transformation under Commercial Registration CR 7003024853.
aboutUs.paragraph1: Through decades of deep engineering excellence, we partner with leading public bodies and private ventures inside the Kingdom to prototype, scale, and secure high-availability systems.
aboutUs.paragraph2: Aligned with the Kingdom's Vision 2030, we deliver sovereign technology capabilities that drive operational efficiency, user satisfaction, and scalable growth.

vision2030.title: Vision 2030 Integration
vision2030.desc: AAT is committed to building Saudi Arabia's digital future. By engineering secure national platforms, supporting local tech capabilities, and executing localized industrial-grade solutions, we are actively contributing to the Kingdom's national transformation agenda.

value1.title: Excellence
value1.desc: We push boundaries and enforce stringent software quality standards in every line of code.

value2.title: Innovation
value2.desc: Staying ahead of the technology curve with cloud architectures, serverless computing, and AI integration.

value3.title: Partnership
value3.desc: We function as your embedded tech co-founders, steering your strategic roadmap with total integrity.

value4.title: Quality
value4.desc: Engineered for 100% robust up-times, secure authorization, and frictionless high-speed user experience.

services.title: Engineered for Enterprise Performance
services.subtitle: We provide end-to-end modern technology consulting, customized interface designs, and secure high-scale backend deployments for the Saudi market.

web.title: Web Development
web.desc: Architecting ultra-fast, high-converting, and SEO-optimized web applications with seamless server rendering and airtight security.
web.longDesc: Whether building high-concurrency client portals, headless e-commerce structures, or corporate engines, we deliver enterprise-grade performance. Our systems are fortified against common vulnerabilities and optimized for the highest Lighthouse metrics.

mobile.title: Mobile Apps
mobile.desc: Developing visually immersive, native-performance iOS and Android mobile applications utilizing single-codebase velocity.
mobile.longDesc: We engineer polished touch interfaces, native hardware integrations, and offline synchronization capabilities with Flutter. Our apps transition fluidly on mobile systems while preserving power-consumption and memory.

desktop.title: Desktop & ERP Systems
desktop.desc: Bespoke desktop operating clients, administrative dashboards, and customized ERP integrations to streamline local businesses.
desktop.longDesc: Our WPF and .NET Core applications integrate with legacy systems, manage large-scale warehouse operations, and automate financial processes with localized tax compliant reporting in Saudi Arabia.

ai.title: AI & Automation
ai.desc: Automating manual business workflows by injecting custom-trained large language models, agent systems, and reporting tools.
ai.longDesc: By leveraging safe Gemini and OpenAI APIs, custom cloud infrastructure, and tools like n8n and Microsoft Power BI, we eliminate manual bottlenecks and uncover deep data insights for decision makers.

marketing.title: Digital Marketing
marketing.desc: Amplifying your online brand authority using growth-focused search marketing, performance ads, and organic social strategy.
marketing.longDesc: Our analytics-first approach ensures every advertising Riyal is accounted for. We design high-converting landing pages, optimize SEO positioning for local maps, and run high-efficiency acquisition campaigns.

motion.title: Motion Graphics & Branding
motion.desc: Shaping memorable visual identities, promotional content reels, and elegant logos designed to capture user interest.
motion.longDesc: We align your visual branding with contemporary regional expectations. From corporate style guidelines to 2D/3D explainers, we articulate your technical value in beautiful, motion-designed details.

whyChooseUs.title: A Digital Partner Built on Trust & Performance
whyChooseUs.subtitle: Why top Saudi businesses select ASMA Advanced Technology for their high-stakes technological investments.
whyChooseUs.col1Desc: From discovery and visual product planning down to database architecture, automated tests, and deployment, we handle the entire project lifecycle.
whyChooseUs.col2Desc: Deep local alignment with Saudi regulations, compliance guidelines, visual preferences, and localized billing/tax integrations.
whyChooseUs.col3Desc: We reject vague metrics. We design key performance indicators (KPIs) to monitor digital acquisition rates, loading speeds, and database query times.

process.title: How We Turn Ideas Into Real Value
process.subtitle: Our highly structured, Agile engineering workflow ensures total clarity, swift progress, and continuous visual previews.
process.step1Desc: Defining structural features, user personas, flow diagrams, and detailed functional specs.
process.step2Desc: Forging beautiful client-approved wireframes, UI layouts, high-fidelity mockups, and micro-animations.
process.step3Desc: Writing type-safe code, setting up server-side routing, database endpoints, and core engine blocks.
process.step4Desc: Validating multi-device responsiveness and executing comprehensive security and stress testing.
process.step5Desc: Handling zero-downtime container deployment, monitoring operational logs, and coordinating marketing funnels.

pricing.title: Bespoke Plans Crafted for Your Success
pricing.subtitle: Choose an investment range that fits your immediate business objectives, fully scalable as you expand.

features.hosting: Cloud Run or Host setup & scaling

testimonials.title: Endorsed by Saudi Decision Makers
testimonials.subtitle: Read reviews from founders and executives who chose AAT to scale their operational limits.
testimonials.client1Text: AAT delivered a highly resilient warehouse management client that integrated perfectly with our existing .NET database ERP. Their Riyadh-local team understands Saudi logistics compliance like no other.
testimonials.client2Text: The mobile iOS and Android apps created by AAT are stunningly rapid and elegant. Submitting files is instant and leads are immediately routed to our security staff. Brilliant local engineering.
testimonials.client3Role: Director of Technology • Advanced Health KSA
testimonials.client3Text: We automated our patient survey extractions using a custom LLM pipeline designed by AAT. Their compliance checks and deep understanding of Saudi standards are second to none.

portfolio.title: Engineered for Saudi Excellence
portfolio.subtitle: An overview of bespoke client systems, modern platforms, and mobile apps created by our team.

project1.title: Riyadh Logistics Grid
project1.desc: A heavy-duty tracking hub organizing massive fleet coordination, fleet routes, and real-time delivery confirmations across Saudi Arabia.
project1.challenge: Client needed to handle thousands of active delivery points simultaneously with sub-second response times and precise offline synchronization.
project1.solution: We designed a customized Next.js web application coupled with server-side caching and atomic state updates, reducing latency by 45%.

project2.title: Al-Ma'aly Financial Client
project2.desc: A secure, encrypted wealth management application connecting high-velocity investors to customized portfolio dashboards.
project2.challenge: Airtight encryption and continuous data synchronization without compromising smartphone device power consumption or page speed.
project2.solution: Built utilizing type-safe Flutter engines combined with biometric authorization, local cache encryption, and real-time push streams.

project3.title: Sovereign Industrial ERP
project3.desc: A massive desktop dashboard automating production tracking, stock levels, localized tax invoices, and reporting sheets.
project3.challenge: Fragmented stock records across 14 warehouses and manual excel logging that resulted in critical tracking errors and delays.
project3.solution: WPF and .NET 8 core systems binding warehouses into a single centralized dashboard with instant barcode-triggered state mutations.

project4.title: Saudi Medical Extraction AI
project4.desc: An automated medical summary processor converting chaotic client files into structured, secure patient metrics.
project4.challenge: Manual reading of unstructured tables and medical scan write-ups took over 20 minutes per patient, creating a massive patient backlog.
project4.solution: A custom AI indexing pipeline processing unstructured clinical reports with highly scoped verification layers to ensure medical safety.

project5.title: Tamkeen E-Academy Portal
project5.desc: A high-performance bilingual learning management portal serving active courses and testing sheets to students.
project5.challenge: Low client engagement and high loading times on high-latency 4G networks during peak national exam days.
project5.solution: Extremely lightweight static page rendering coupled with dynamic lightweight database queries, supporting over 10K parallel users.

project6.title: Desert Bloom Digital Engine
project6.desc: A predictive smart marketing scheduler analyzing localized trend cycles and dispatching social media creatives.
project6.challenge: Optimizing advertising budget yields across fragmented localized Riyadh interest groups.
project6.solution: Power BI pipelines linked with custom scheduling algorithms that adjust advertising spend based on peak local micro-engagements.

contact.title: Let's Consult on Your Digital Milestones
contact.subtitle: Drop us a message. Our local Riyadh engineering staff will respond with an initial free estimate in under 24 hours.
contact.successMessage: Thank you! Your project request has been logged successfully. Our Riyadh team will follow up via email or phone within 2 hours.
contact.errorMessage: An error occurred while logging your message. Please try again or reach out on WhatsApp.
